arts.ttl: Alexander-Arnold could douse the fire around him but Liverpool owners deserve heat too | Barney Ronay
arts.sum: The full-back is clearly itching to move but an unrealistic Local Lad premium is demanded of him that reflects wider alienation Stop talking about this thing I’m talking about. Enough already with the big media fuss I am making a big media fuss over. This kind of messaging is always hard to swallow. Why, the angry man demanded, is everyone so angry right now? For all that, the fuss over Trent Alexander-Arnold is definitely real, whatever its source or ultimate legitimacy. Why does everyone care so much about this? It seems weird, disproportionate and strangely fevered, not to mention hostage to some persuasive media voices that carry a bit too much unexamined fan-feeling and not enough of the old journalistic detachment. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool could hijack ‘world-class’ Man City target; reliable journalist says Reds ‘looking’ at him
arts.sum: Liverpool’s need for a star holding midfielder evaporated in weeks after Ryan Gravenberch took to the field under Arne Slot. Despite the jury being firmly out on the Dutch international ahead of the 2024/25 campaign, the former Bayern Munich flop went on to secure a well-deserved starting berth in the first-XI. arts.sum: Many will have viewed the third round tie with Accrington Stanley as the perfect moment for the winger to start but Slot has cautioned against making assumptions.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed new Mohamed Salah contract verdict as key transfer point made
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is out of contract in June and could leave Liverpool at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia BOMBSHELL: Liverpool & Chelsea given transfer hope
arts.sum: The Georgia winger is interested in joining PSG before the January window shuts, but the Ligue 1 giants aren’t able to fund a deal as things stand, which could help the likes of Chelsea and Liverpool hijack his proposed move to the French capital. TEAMtalk have revealed that Liverpool could use Federico Chiesa in a player-plus-cash swap deal for Kvaratskhelia, while Chelsea are eyeing his situation as they consider signing a new forward amid Mykhailo Mudryk’s current provisional suspension.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have an ace up their sleeve that could help them sign Khvicha Kvaratskhelia - opinion
arts.sum: Liverpool weren’t particularly busy in the summer transfer window, but with the January market now open, they may well look to make some more moves....
